title: Add Google OAuth via Supabase
prereqs_human: Enable Google OAuth in Supabase dashboard
Configure Google Cloud Console OAuth consent screen + credentials
Get a Google Gemini API key
Add Supabase redirect URI for OAuth callback
steps: Schema: add userId (text, nullable) to conversations. Create Supabase client singleton.
Login component + auth state in App.tsx. Spinner during auth check. Handle HashRouter + OAuth callback.
Backend JWT middleware via jose + Supabase JWKS. Verify JWT, extract user_id, filter conversations by user.
Frontend authFetch wrapper: inject Bearer token, 401 → refresh → retry once → redirect to login.
acceptance_criteria: No login flash (spinner during auth check)
Each user only sees their own conversations
